title: BGE Reranker
author: OrcVole
tagline: Self-hosted reranking API (BAAI bge-reranker-v2-m3 on HuggingFace TEI)

apikey.message: Get your API key: open a Terminal for this app (the `>_` button) and run `cat /app/data/.secrets/keys.env`. Send it as `Authorization: Bearer <key>` to `POST /rerank`.

api.message: This is a reranking API, not a web page. The model `BAAI/bge-reranker-v2-m3` is baked into the image, so the app is ready within seconds of install (no download). Call `POST /rerank` with a `query` and a list of `texts`. The browsable Swagger docs are at `/docs` (behind login).
